name: Sixth Grade Language Arts
description: Reading, writing, and communication skills for sixth graders at Bonneville Academy. Novel studies, expository writing, poetry, and grammar. Weekly guardian summary emails include reading log completion and turned-in work.

name: Sixth Grade Math
description: Pre-algebra readiness for sixth graders. Fractions, decimals, ratios and proportions, integers, expressions, and introductory geometry. Guardian observer summaries every Friday.

name: Sixth Grade Life Science
description: Introduction to cells, body systems, ecosystems, and earth systems for sixth graders at Bonneville Academy. Hands-on labs, dissections, and a spring geology project (volcanoes and plate tectonics).

name: Sixth Grade World History
description: Survey of early civilizations for sixth graders: Mesopotamia, Ancient Egypt, Indus Valley, and early China. Emphasis on primary source reading, map skills, and short research papers.

name: Sixth Grade Physical Education
description: Movement, fitness, team sports, and healthy habits for sixth graders. Weekly fitness log, unit-based skill assessments in basketball, volleyball, and track. Please send a labeled water bottle.

name: Sixth Grade Art
description: Visual art foundations for sixth graders. Drawing fundamentals, charcoal portraits, printmaking, ceramics, and the spring art show. Supplies provided; students may bring their own sketchbook.

name: Sixth Grade Advisory
description: Homeroom and social-emotional learning block for Ms. Rivera's sixth grade cohort at Bonneville Academy. Goal setting, study habits, weekly community circle, and daily announcements land here.

name: Third Grade Reading and Writing
descriptionHeading: Welcome to 3rd Grade Reading and Writing
description: Ms. Ramirez's third grade literacy block at Bonneville Academy. Guided reading groups, chapter book studies, weekly reading log, personal narrative writing, and spelling practice.

name: Third Grade Math
description: Third grade math with Mr. Ortega. Multiplication and division fact fluency, fractions on a number line, area and perimeter, and word problem strategies. Xtra Math practice assigned nightly.

name: Third Grade Science
description: Third grade science with Ms. Lundquist. Habitats and ecosystems, weather and climate, forces and motion, and animal adaptations. Includes a fall habitat diorama and spring weather journal.

name: Third Grade Social Studies
description: Third grade social studies with Ms. Lundquist. Utah geography and communities, map skills, cultures of Utah's indigenous peoples, and civic responsibility. Includes a Utah landmarks poster project.

name: Third Grade Physical Education
description: Third grade PE with Coach Nakamura. Movement, coordination, cooperative games, jump rope, and the K-3 fitness challenge. Please send a labeled water bottle and non-marking sneakers.

name: Third Grade Music
description: Third grade general music with Mr. Ashby. Rhythm, singing, world music listening, and beginning recorder. Third graders will perform at the winter concert on December 18.

name: Third Grade Art
description: Third grade art with Ms. Beckett. Watercolor landscapes, self-portraits, clay pinch pots, and the spring art show. Supplies provided; smocks welcome.

name: Fifth Grade Language Arts (2024-25)
description: Ms. Larkin's fifth grade language arts course from the 2024-25 school year at Bonneville Academy. Archived for guardian reference. Novel studies, essay writing, and grammar fundamentals.

name: Fifth Grade Math (2024-25)
description: Mr. Palmer's fifth grade math course from the 2024-25 school year. Archived for guardian reference. Multi-digit multiplication and division, decimals, fractions, and volume.

name: Fifth Grade Science (2024-25)
description: Ms. Field's fifth grade science course from the 2024-25 school year. Archived for guardian reference. Matter and energy, earth systems, plant and animal biology, and the spring plant growth experiment.

name: Second Grade Reading (2024-25)
description: Ms. Meyers's second grade reading course from the 2024-25 school year. Archived for guardian reference. Guided reading, decoding, fluency, and early chapter books.

name: Second Grade Math (2024-25)
description: Mr. Coates's second grade math course from the 2024-25 school year. Archived for guardian reference. Place value, skip counting, addition and subtraction within 100, and beginning multiplication.

name: Second Grade Science (2024-25)
description: Ms. Boyle's second grade science course from the 2024-25 school year. Archived for guardian reference. Simple machines, weather, plants and pollinators, and animal life cycles.
